hero.name: Julio Sánchez Aniceto
hero.title: Junior Web Developer
hero.description: Building web applications with clean code and responsive design. Currently specializing in cybersecurity and secure web development practices.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Junior web developer based in Palma, Spain, trained in Full Stack Web Development (DAW). I build web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies, and I'm currently specializing in cybersecurity with a focus on secure development and vulnerability analysis.

highlights.text: I enjoy building web applications from scratch, working across the full stack. I'm passionate about clean, maintainable code and responsive, user-friendly design.
My approach is practical: understand the problem, choose the right tool, and build a solid solution. I've worked with PHP, JavaScript, Laravel, React, MySQL, MongoDB, and more.
Currently training in cybersecurity (Certificado de Profesionalidad Nivel 3 SOIB), expanding my perspective on secure development practices and vulnerability analysis.

achievements: Developed web applications from scratch using frontend and backend technologies
Implemented improvements and new features on existing WordPress sites
Optimized site performance and ensured responsive, cross-device design
Participated in the full development lifecycle from requirements to deployment
jobs.highlights: Full-cycle web development across frontend and backend in a professional environment

achievements: Managed and queried data using MySQL databases
Built responsive web templates for eBay hardware product listings
Collaborated in inventory management integrating physical product information
Ensured consistent layout and usability across different screen sizes
jobs.highlights: E-commerce web development and database management for hardware product sales
